subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest me oppressed amidst the rebellious among Thy creatures and a stranger in Thy kingdom, wheresoever I dwell [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ترانی مظلوما بین عصاه بریتک و غریبا فی مملکتک کلما سکنت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God
